notes: A single unbroken paragraph of ~5000 words (synthetic Item 1A risk factor boilerplate for Omega Capital Partners, Inc.) with no headings, no cover-page structure, and no extractable SEC metadata fields. Tests that the extractor does not hallucinate filer name, form type, or dates from a dense, structureless wall of prose. The registrant name appears in the body but in a non-cover-page context and should not be extracted as filer_name.
